title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 301.360 - Record established by chapter 301 to be retained or destroyed, when
text:
301.360.  Record established by chapter 301 to be retained or destroyed, when. — Records established pursuant to this chapter shall be retained or destroyed in accordance with the provisions of chapter 109.
(RSMo 1939 § 8368, A.L. 1945 p. 1194, A.L. 1947 V. I p. 380; L. 1945 p. 1222 § 1; A. 1949 S.B. 1110, A.L. 1987 S.B. 3) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 7760
